text.message: I’m giving you guys the game
if you do that, you will give oj what he wants
where else would I have gone on the map?
id have no way to get to wood
Orange I don’t care what you say
I’m soloing you rest of game
youare in a great spot still
can get to 11 9 3 that you covet so much
and would have more brick for your brick port
you may honestly be in the best spot
Orange there is not a thing you can say
I’ll give away everything to make sure you don’t win
i wish someone as highly ranked as green would realize that 8 10 was by far my best play
green will take road soon from red
green costing himself the game to red could be funny though
red with a huge decision here with green 4 cards away from the win
and he steals from me LOL
how did green win? this was such an unfair game for him
feel so bad for his starting position
but red also misplayed this tragically
sitting on a mono and uses it now on a card that green doesnt need to win
